description: Integer overflows and underflows occur when arithmetic operations exceed the bounds of the integer data type, causing the value to "wrap around" to an unexpected number.
name: Integer Overflows and Underflows
remediation: - **Use Solidity 0.8.0 or later:** Leverage the compiler’s built-in overflow and underflow checks. - **Apply SafeMath libraries:** Use libraries like OpenZeppelin’s `SafeMath` for versions before 0.8.0.
